c_signature: static void mpfr_exp_rational (mpfr_ptr y, mpz_ptr p, long r, int m, mpz_t *P, mpfr_prec_t *mult)
doc:
PARKED. Static helper for mpfr_exp (mpfr/src/exp3.c). Computes the rational-approximation core of exp via a Brent-style binary-splitting recursion. ADR 0002 criterion (i): no public-API caller in the TS port (mpfr_exp not yet selected). Standalone port would produce dead code.

Unblock condition: when mpfr_exp is selected for porting.
